visualizerParams.title: First Fibonacci with N Digits
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Fix the loop logic and digit counting to correctly find the index of the first term with N digits.
visualizerParams.buggyCode:
def solution(n: int = 1000) -> int:
    f1, f2 = 1, 1
    index = 1
    # BUG: index should start at 2 since we are looking for the next terms
    # BUG: The loop condition might miss the first occurrence if not handled carefully
    while len(str(f1)) < n:
        # BUG: Swapping logic is incorrect
        f1 = f2
        f2 = f1 + f2
        index += 1
    return index


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(solution(1000))
